description.base: 8-year-old East Asian boy, realistic child skin texture with visible pores and subtle natural flush, natural skin tone with healthy warmth
description.hair: short straight black hair with natural texture, slight bed-head imperfection, childlike natural messiness
description.eyes: proportionally sized dark brown child eyes with natural moisture, realistic iris texture, no sparkling or oversized anime eyes
description.facialFeatures: natural round-square child face with subtle asymmetry, realistic child proportions, natural chubby cheeks with natural skin tone not exaggerated rosy
description.attire: traditional Chinese children frog-button top in light blue or white, dark cloth shoes with realistic fabric texture, clean but naturally worn, realistic clothing folds
description.expression: natural child expressions ranging from curious to puzzled to happy, genuine emotional reactions, no exaggerated theatrical or staged poses, no artificial cute poses
description.movement: natural child movement, realistic physics, sitting naturally, standing with child posture, no cartoonish bounce or artificial smoothness
